title: Use of English - Test 2
explanation:
Use of English - B1 Test 2

More mixed B1 practice.

questions.text: She asked me where I [*had bought|did buy|have bought] the jacket.
This app is [*more reliable|reliabler|most reliable] than the old one.
We [*used to live|were used to live|use to living] near the station.
You [*mustn't|don't have to|shouldn't to] use your phone during the exam.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: He promised ____ me as soon as he arrived. | *to call | calling | call
I know the café ____ serves excellent coffee. | *which | where | whose
The weather was awful, but we ____ managed to finish the walk. | *still | yet | already
She has been studying ____ six o'clock. | *since | for | during
The city has introduced a bike scheme to reduce [*traffic|lecture|trust].
I [*would not have gone|did not go|would not go] there if I had known the truth.
They [*have never travelled|never travelled|are never travelling] abroad before.
He needs to [*hand in|set off|grow up] the assignment by Friday.
